consistency.rarity_and_source: Consistent. Declared as 'Uncommon' and tagged in 'source_type_rarity' as 'Wondrous item, uncommon'.
consistency.charge_management: Consistent. Tracks initial charges (50), expenditure (1 or 5), and depletion condition (becomes nonmagical jewel worth 50 gp).

quality.description_clarity: High. The description clearly outlines the three functions, associated costs/effects, and duration mechanics.
quality.mechanics_completeness: Good. Provides specific range, saving throw DC (15), save type (Constitution), duration (1 minute), and repeat save condition.

function_1_light.effect: Sheds bright light (30ft) and dim light (additional 30ft).
function_1_light.cancellation: Bonus action to repeat command word or use another function.

function_2_beam.effect: Fires a brilliant beam. Target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become blinded for 1 minute.
function_2_beam.save_repeat: Yes, at the end of each turn.

function_3_cone.effect: Flares in a 30-foot cone. Creatures in the cone must make the same save as the beam effect.
function_3_cone.save_type_reference: References the save mechanics of the second command word.

depletion.result: Becomes a nonmagical jewel worth 50 gp.

suggestions: Standardize the reference to the condition effect (e.g., explicitly state 'becomes blinded' instead of using the placeholder '[blinded](#blinded)' if this format is for static archival rather than linked documentation).
